{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032121212540D76A748F6B453284EE"}"},"total":50},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601540956712518462","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很棒！写的好看!第一次看见这种题材!就是不够看啊！少了!什么时候上架大更新……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769874492,"group_id":"7597189291961240600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"老书虫在闹饥荒","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwNC3VxVbCpcWd6wTVyRkl4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c38231c547ad4b929648368fe284418e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623067&x-signature=GFrP4iVVt4pB4%2F5XS4%2FSEHvyQsg%3D","user_id":"747306286846317","user_name":"ZLH艾特"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"747306286846317","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1716525563,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597189291961240600","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿书反派+写日记变强+全员读心+女主倒追+暴揍龙王】
沈琛穿越到都市爽文《霸主天下》，成了注定被主角打脸的富二代反派。
只要苟完剧情，扮演好舔狗和脑残反派，就能带着亿万家产回到现实。
为了打发时间，他每天写写日记吐槽剧情，顺便领取系统奖励。
【秦疏这个傻白甜，放着豪门不嫁，非要喜欢那个只会歪嘴笑的油腻龙王？】
【齐欢这老古板，要是穿上黑丝，绝对是制服诱惑，可惜是个性冷淡。】
【今天就要被萧淮打脸了，好期待，演完这波我就能下班去洗脚了！】
然而，沈琛万万没想到，女主们竟然人手一本他的日记副本！
剧情彻底崩坏！
订婚宴上，秦疏看着“龙王”萧淮：“给你五百块，拿着钱滚，别妨碍我倒追沈琛！”
办公室里，高冷主任齐欢换上黑丝短裙，壁咚沈琛：“听说你想看这个？今晚去我家，让你看个够。”
巷战现场，本该大杀四方的主角萧淮，被齐欢派去的人打断三根肋骨，哭晕在厕所……
沈琛看着这一幕幕，彻底凌乱了：“大姐们，我是反派啊！求求你们按剧本来行不行？再这样下去，主角都要被你们玩死了！”
本书专治各种不服，暴虐原著歪嘴龙王，女主全员自我攻略，简介无力，请看正文！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bc68e3ac9136fb6c0ae9380e29cd47b2","author":"明揽月","author_id":"","book_id":"7597189291961240600","book_name":"反派日记曝光，女主全疯了！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7597191916194628120","read_count":"36012","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"397964"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.5","serial_count":"190","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,多女主,反派,穿书","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8d90be4dc2db5ce9850708399cf41c17~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779283286&x-signature=UtuYbrHgxrfv7ykRLT04ykej6Fk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1319054804004015","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"67"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032121212540D76A748F6B453284EE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18822,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":4205},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614906289176462105","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"来，作者跟我读，我庄严的宣誓：从今天开始，永不断更。我将不看剧，不旅游，不生病。我将不玩游戏，不水文。严格自律，惜时如金，不屈不挠，奋斗拼搏，崇尚一流，力铸辉煌，以码为乐，百炼成钢，无愧于读者，无愧于青春，无愧于未来。作为一名作者，我庄严宣誓：我坚信我是一名优秀作者。码字是我的天职，我潜力无穷不怕吃苦!我能勤奋码字我是黑暗中的键盘，网文长城上的守卫，我自愿将生命奉献于码字日日如此，夜夜皆然。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772985017,"group_id":"7597189291961240600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N98n0fOBSIpHD7dpUkwtE5m/KkaDKp9Dfi9oBK9zaPIV","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fadde5b1f10c4cd0abd5a4b0f51abb17~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615596&x-signature=%2Fb4eDxFKgocsyVBPY1j0nvxm2Os%3D","user_id":"2766013006624955","user_name":"枫红烧叶落"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2766013006624955","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1663162732,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597189291961240600","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿书反派+写日记变强+全员读心+女主倒追+暴揍龙王】
